discord.name: discord
discord.description: Webhook-based Discord integration — jobs, channels, presence, and chargen events
discord.author: unknown

jobs.name: jobs
jobs.description: Anomaly-style jobs/request system — player requests, staff commands, bucket access, archive, REST API
jobs.author: unknown

events.name: events
events.description: In-game event calendar with RSVP tracking and REST API
events.author: unknown

wiki.name: wiki
wiki.description: File-based markdown wiki — pages, search, history, access control, backlinks, and Discord webhooks.
wiki.author: unknown

mail.name: mail
mail.description: In-game mail system — drafts, reply/forward, folders, attachments, quota, expiry, and REST API.
mail.author: unknown

builder.name: builder
builder.description: World-building commands (@dig, @open, @link, @describe, @examine, and more) plus REST API at /api/v1/building/*.
builder.author: unknown

bbs.name: bbs
bbs.description: Full-featured Myrddin-style BBS — boards, threading, categories, IC/OOC tags, sticky posts, moderation, Discord webhooks, and scene linking.
bbs.author: unknown

channel.name: channel
channel.description: Channel system — alias dispatch, auto-join on login, @chancreate/@chandestroy/@chanset/@channel, message history.
channel.author: unknown

help.name: help
help.description: API-first help system — aggregates command help, per-plugin help folders, and runtime DB entries. Replaces the native help command.
help.author: unknown
